since_last: 39% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.25%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 39% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC -1.78% · Gold -1.44% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 39% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.25%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.25%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.73%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +11.88%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +11.88%, ANET +8.73%, SMCI +6.78%, BIDU +5.72%, AVGO +4.74%. Laggards: PANW -4.74%, WDAY -4.28%, UPST -3.93%, ZS -3.91%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.31% at $149.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.31% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
